title: JEI Recipe History Addon 1.16.5
description: Recipe History Addon for JEI in 1.16.5
body:
Just a simple Recipe History addon for JEI. Inspired by JEI Utilities and JEI Recipe History for 1.18.5.

Comes with a couple options you can configure in the toml. I built this for the current stable release of JEI, which is 1009, so it is required. Not sure if the few newer beta tracks will work.
